g.title: cluster_auth
g.text: FastAPI Dependencies (Depends — injected into every endpoint)

g.title: cluster_validation
g.text: validate_path(path: str) → Path shared by ALL service methods

g.title: cluster_upload
g.text: POST /upload Special Flow (handled at route level — bypasses FilesystemService methods)

g.title: cluster_errors
g.text: Exception → HTTP Status Code (caught in route handlers)

g.title: cluster_categories
g.text: FILE_CATEGORIES (7 backend categories) used by detect_file_type() → returned as 'category' in GET /info

g.title: up1
g.text: get directory Path for upload destination

g.title: vp1
g.text: strip leading slash from raw input

g.title: err_notfound
g.text: raised by: list, info, getfp, rename, delete

g.title: up5
g.text: second boundary check on full destination

g.title: err_nospace
g.text: OSError: No space left on device (upload only)
